flavorText: They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast.

name: yamask
flavorText: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.

name: cofagrigus
flavorText: It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets.

name: tirtouga
flavorText: Restored from a fossil, this Pokémon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.

name: carracosta
flavorText: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.

name: archen
flavorText: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokémon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.

name: archeops
flavorText: They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight.

name: trubbish
flavorText: Inhaling the gas they belch will make you sleep for a week. They prefer unsanitary places.

name: garbodor
flavorText: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.

name: zorua
flavorText: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

name: zoroark
flavorText: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.

name: minccino
flavorText: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.

name: cinccino
flavorText: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.

name: gothita
flavorText: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.

name: gothorita
flavorText: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.

name: gothitelle
flavorText: Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power.

name: solosis
flavorText: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.

name: duosion
flavorText: Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once.

name: reuniclus
flavorText: They use psychic power to control their arms, which are made of a special liquid. They can crush boulders psychically.

name: ducklett
flavorText: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.

name: swanna
flavorText: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

name: vanillite
flavorText: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.

name: vanillish
flavorText: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon’s habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.

name: vanilluxe
flavorText: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards.

name: deerling
flavorText: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.

name: sawsbuck
flavorText: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck’s horns.

name: emolga
flavorText: The energy made in its cheeks’ electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding.

name: karrablast
flavorText: These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.

name: escavalier
flavorText: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.

name: foongus
flavorText: It lures people in with its Poké Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poké Ball is unknown.

name: amoonguss
flavorText: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.

name: frillish-male
flavorText: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.

name: jellicent-male
flavorText: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent’s habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.

name: alomomola
flavorText: The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.

name: joltik
flavorText: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.

name: galvantula
flavorText: When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads.

name: ferroseed
flavorText: When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away.

name: ferrothorn
flavorText: It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble.

name: klink
flavorText: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

name: klang
flavorText: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.

name: klinklang
flavorText: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.

name: tynamo
flavorText: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

name: eelektrik
flavorText: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.

name: eelektross
flavorText: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

name: elgyem
flavorText: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent’s brain, causing unendurable headaches.

name: beheeyem
flavorText: It can manipulate an opponent’s memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers.

name: litwick
flavorText: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

name: lampent
flavorText: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.

name: chandelure
flavorText: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.

name: axew
flavorText: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.

name: fraxure
flavorText: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they’ve been fighting.

name: haxorus
flavorText: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.

name: cubchoo
flavorText: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.

name: beartic
flavorText: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.

name: cryogonal
flavorText: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.

name: shelmet
flavorText: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.

name: accelgor
flavorText: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.

name: stunfisk
flavorText: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.

name: mienfoo
flavorText: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.

name: mienshao
flavorText: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.

name: druddigon
flavorText: It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move.

name: golett
flavorText: The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.

name: golurk
flavorText: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.

name: pawniard
flavorText: Blades comprise this Pokémon’s entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.

name: bisharp
flavorText: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses.

name: bouffalant
flavorText: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

name: rufflet
flavorText: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.

name: braviary
flavorText: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.

name: vullaby
flavorText: Its wings are too tiny to allow it to fly. As the time approaches for it to evolve, it discards the bones it was wearing.

name: mandibuzz
flavorText: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.

name: heatmor
flavorText: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.

name: durant
flavorText: They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor.

name: deino
flavorText: It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.

name: zweilous
flavorText: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.

name: hydreigon
flavorText: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.

name: larvesta
flavorText: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.

name: volcarona
flavorText: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona’s fire provided a replacement for the sun.

name: cobalion
flavorText: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.

name: terrakion
flavorText: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.

name: virizion
flavorText: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.

name: tornadus-incarnate
flavorText: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

name: thundurus-incarnate
flavorText: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.

name: reshiram
flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

name: zekrom
flavorText: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.

name: landorus-incarnate
flavorText: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”

name: kyurem
flavorText: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.

name: keldeo-ordinary
flavorText: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.

name: meloetta-aria
flavorText: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

name: genesect
flavorText: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.
